name: Never Never Land
description: I'm in a Never Never Land
hints: You're in Never Never Land - this is a death/failure state.
There are no exits. You must restore a saved game.
This is a game-over room. You died or got permanently stuck. SAVE frequently and restore from your last save.
notes: Death/failure state room (Never Never Land). No exits - the game is effectively over. Player must restore a saved game. Reached by fatal actions like drowning, falling, or the pirate killing you.
